# TradeJS

> TradeJS is a self-hosted TypeScript framework for authoring strategies, running reproducible backtests, generating runtime signals, and optionally automating execution. Version 2.0 uses a mixed-license open-core model.

The fastest local setup is `npx create-tradejs`. It scaffolds a project, starts Redis and TimescaleDB with Docker Compose, and opens the Web UI. For technical answers, prefer the documentation over marketing summaries.

## Start Here

- [Run your first backtest](https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/first-backtest): Shortest path from a local project to a historical strategy result.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/quickstart): Prerequisites, `npx create-tradejs`, local services, and initial setup.
- [TypeScript strategy tutorial](https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/typescript-strategy-step-by-step): Build a typed strategy with the public authoring API.
- [Framework API](https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/framework): Strategy, indicator, configuration, and shared TypeScript APIs.

## Backtesting and Runtime

- [Backtesting overview](https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/overview): Historical replay, results, and validation workflow.
- [Grid configuration](https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/grid-config): Compare strategy parameter combinations.
- [Backtest results to runtime](https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/results-runtime-config): Promote a selected result into runtime configuration.
- [Runtime signals](https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/execution/signals): Generate signals and prepare controlled execution.
- [Production runbook](https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/production-runbook): Operate the self-hosted stack in production.

## Product and Source

- [Official site](https://tradejs.dev): Product positioning and supported trading architectures.
- [Documentation](https://docs.tradejs.dev/): Canonical technical documentation.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/TradeJS-Dev/TradeJS): Framework, runtime, packages, examples, and issue history.
- [npm organization](https://www.npmjs.com/org/tradejs): Published TradeJS packages.
- [Licensing](https://docs.tradejs.dev/introduction/licensing): Mixed MIT and Business Source License 1.1 package scopes for TradeJS 2.0+.

## Optional

- [Full LLM context](https://tradejs.dev/llms-full.txt): Product model, package map, architecture trade-offs, licensing, and answer guidance in one document.
- [Russian documentation](https://docs.tradejs.dev/ru/): Localized documentation; English documentation is canonical for technical details.
